primary_corpus.name: th1nhng0/vietnamese-legal-documents
primary_corpus.notes: Official VBPL-derived legal document corpus with content, metadata, and relationship splits.

primary_corpus.name: duyet/vietnamese-legal-documents-dataset
primary_corpus.notes: Repository companion for the Vietnamese legal document dataset.

primary_corpus.name: mlalab/VNLegalText
primary_corpus.notes: Vietnamese legal document dataset useful as supplemental retrieval/evaluation data.

primary_corpus.name: 52100303-TranPhuocSang/vietnamese-legal-corpus-20k-raw
primary_corpus.notes: Raw legal corpus that can be normalized into article-level chunks after manual checks.

retrieval_and_dev_sets.name: YuITC/Vietnamese-Legal-Documents
retrieval_and_dev_sets.notes: Question/context retrieval benchmark; useful for tuning but not the main article corpus.

retrieval_and_dev_sets.name: thiemcun169/Vietnamese-Legal-Information-Retrieval
retrieval_and_dev_sets.notes: Implementation/reference project for Vietnamese legal information retrieval.

retrieval_and_dev_sets.name: hieunguyen1053/vlegal-bench
retrieval_and_dev_sets.notes: Benchmark/reference only; keep separate from the official test flow.

qa_and_instruction_data.name: duyet/vietnamese-legal-instruct
qa_and_instruction_data.notes: Instruction conversations; useful for answer style checks, not as a primary retrieval corpus.

qa_and_instruction_data.name: thangvip/vietnamese-legal-qa
qa_and_instruction_data.notes: QA data for offline evaluation or instruction-tuning experiments.

qa_and_instruction_data.name: thangvip/combined-vietnamese-legal-text
qa_and_instruction_data.notes: Supplemental text for model adaptation experiments; keep out of the default pipeline unless audited.

model_candidates.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
model_candidates.notes: Best default local generator under the contest constraints.

model_candidates.name: BAAI/bge-m3
model_candidates.notes: Multilingual dense retriever with strong Vietnamese support.

model_candidates.name: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3
model_candidates.notes: Cross-encoder reranker for the top BM25/dense candidates.

model_candidates.name: mainguyen9/vietlegal-e5
model_candidates.notes: Legal-specific but uploaded after the model cutoff; benchmark only unless rules allow.

model_candidates.name: kiencnt2205/vietnamese-legal-reranker-bge-base
model_candidates.notes: Legal-specific reranker, but after-cutoff; benchmark only.

leakage_watchlist.name: noname002/* FastViLR legal conversions
leakage_watchlist.notes: Created around the contest period; keep out of final pipeline unless audited for leakage.
